results.title: Mercedes S-Class facelift to launch in India on June 15th
results.description: Mercedes S-Class facelift will come to India as a plug-in hybrid powertrain, on June 15th. A petrol powertrain is set to be added to the line later, though nothing is known about a diesel option for now.

results.title: Google Drive ban of a manga artist is a stark reminder that “private” cloud files are still subject to platform rules
results.description: A Japanese manga artist, Masahiro Itosugi, says Google permanently disabled his account after he uploaded old manga data to Google Drive and the file triggered a policy warning. In a post on X (translated from Japanese), he said his appeal was rejected and the account was banned, cutting him off not just from Drive, but [...] The post Google Drive ban of a manga artist is a stark reminder that “private” cloud files are still subject to platform rules appeared first on PiunikaWeb .
